description_long: This self-service payment kiosk or terminal features a tall, rectangular structure with a robust metallic body and a dark upper section housing a large, vertically oriented touchscreen display. The front panel includes a prominent screen with a colorful interface, a receipt printer slot, a numeric keypad, a card reader, and additional slots for cash or other payment methods. The lower portion is solid and likely contains internal components for security and stability. The sides and back are plain, with a slight angular cut near the top, giving the kiosk a modern, streamlined appearance. The overall design is functional and secure, suitable for high-traffic urban environments such as sidewalks, lobbies, or transit stations. The branding and interface elements are clearly visible on the front, making it user-friendly and easily identifiable.
description: A tall, metallic self-service payment kiosk with a large touchscreen, payment interfaces, and a secure, modern design. The front features a display, keypad, card reader, and receipt slot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen display, keypad, card reader, receipt slot, and branding.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing the kiosk's depth, angular top section, and plain metallic surface.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless, solid metallic back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, highlighting the kiosk's angular profile and plain surface.
attribute_display_screen: A large, vertically oriented rectangular touchscreen is centered on the upper front, surrounded by a thin bezel, displaying a colorful digital interface.
attribute_payment_interface: Front panel includes a numeric keypad, card reader slot, NFC tap area, and cash slot, all located below the display screen.
attribute_branding_or_logo: A digital logo with the text 'DN Vynamic' is visible on the upper portion of the display screen, styled in white and red.
attribute_instructional_signage: No separate instructional signage is visible; user guidance appears integrated into the digital display interface.
attribute_receipt_dispenser: A horizontal receipt dispenser slot is located below the display and above the keypad, easily accessible from the front.
